task_completion.description: Access the OrientDB Studio web interface and connect to the 'demodb' database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html showing the OrientDB Studio interface connected to 'demodb'.

task_completion.description: Execute a query to get the Nationality Distribution.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OrientDB Studio showing query results with the count of profiles per Nationality, sorted in descending order.

task_completion.description: Execute a query to get the Average Hotel Stars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OrientDB Studio showing query results with the average 'Stars' rating of Hotels grouped by Country.

task_completion.description: Execute a query to get Five-Star Hotels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OrientDB Studio showing query results with the Name, City, and Country of all Hotels with 5 Stars.

task_completion.description: Execute a query to get the Restaurant Count.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OrientDB Studio showing query results with the count of Restaurants per Country.

task_completion.description: Execute a query to get Order Revenue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OrientDB Studio showing query results with the total revenue, average price, and count of Orders grouped by Status.

task_completion.description: Save the compiled query results into a single text report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file /home/ga/analytics_report.txt containing the queried data, clearly labeled by section.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface to execute queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OrientDB Studio GUI in a web browser, rather than executing terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actually executed the queries to retrieve the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the query editor and results table in OrientDB Studio, confirming the data was retrieved from the database.

integrity.description: The agent did not fabricate the report data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entered into the analytics_report.txt file matches the results seen in the OrientDB Studio query outputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path for the report is /home/ga/analytics_report.txt. The ground truth directory for verification is /tmp/ground_truth.
